'''Itipiniwi''' was a [[wilwog]] that won Best in Show at the [[Annual Mid-Rim Domesticated Sub-Sentient Show]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. Upon winning, Itipiniwi and its owner celebrated, annoying the runner-up [[bolstyngar]] named [[Boshuda]], which devoured Itipiniwi. Because this had never occurred before in competition history, the bolstygar was awarded Best in Show by forfeit on part of the devoured.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|life/1337_1.html|Best in Show Eaten by Second-Best}} {{1stm}}
